overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character traversing a marshy wetland at night during a storm. The character moves through lily pads and tall grass toward a distant plume of smoke, with dramatic moonlight breaking through storm clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: marsh wetland covered in lily pads

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily through lily pad covered marsh toward distant smoke

entered.detail: dense field of lily pads covering the water surface
dark silhouetted mountains on the horizon
sparse trees with green foliage on the right side
dark column of smoke rising from a distant fire

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks through a vast marsh covered in lily pads under a stormy night sky. Dark mountains loom in the distance while a column of smoke rises from somewhere ahead, and scattered trees line the right side of the frame.

events.description: moon breaks through storm clouds illuminating the scene
ground surface changes from lily pads to tall grass

agents.ego_description: moving through tall grass with camera lowering to grass level perspective

entered.detail: tall green grass surrounding the character at waist height
bright moon partially visible through storm clouds

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from lily pads into tall grass as the camera lowers to ground level. The moon breaks through the storm clouds on the left, casting pale light while the smoke plume shifts to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open marsh with burning village in distance

events.description: burning village structures become visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: traversing mixed grass and marsh toward the source of the smoke

entered.detail: settlement with structures emitting dark smoke and orange firelight

segments.scene_description: Walking through mixed terrain with the bright moon now prominent on the left and the smoke plume growing larger on the right. A burning village becomes visible on the left horizon, revealing the source of the smoke as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow water marsh approaching burning settlement

events.description: entering shallow water with lily pads reflecting the moonlight

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water toward the burning village structures

segments.scene_description: The character returns to wading through shallow water covered in lily pads, with the moon reflecting off the surface. The burning village is now clearly visible on the left at close range, while the smoke plume trails off into the distance on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy marshland that shifts from an open wetland into dense, low-lying grass. It begins with the samurai walking across a vast expanse of lily pads under a dark night sky, with looming mountains and a distant column of smoke visible ahead. As the character advances, the camera lowers toward the ground, transitioning the terrain from the water-covered marsh into thick, tall grass. The scene then shifts in lighting as the moon breaks through the storm clouds on the left, casting a pale glow across the landscape while the plume of smoke drifts toward the right side of the frame.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit wetland that gradually reveals a burning village on the horizon. It begins with the character traversing mixed terrain, where a bright moon dominates the left side of the frame and a distant plume of smoke grows larger to the right. As the character advances, the source of the smoke emerges as a village engulfed in flames on the left horizon. The scene then shifts as the character returns to wading through shallow water covered in lily pads, with the moonlight reflecting off the rippling surface. Finally, the burning village comes into clear, close-range view on the left while the smoke plume trails off into the distance on the right.
